buildspec.yml.general_idea: Install and configure JDK 21 in the build environment to support the migration from Java 17.
buildspec.yml.why_exists: The build will fail at runtime or during compilation if the project requires Java 21 features but the environment only provides Java 17 or an older version.

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Update Maven command to use 'deploy' instead of 'install' and refactor versioning variables.
Update SonarQube property name from 'sonar.login' to 'sonar.token' to align with newer SonarQube API requirements.
buildspec.yml.why_exists: Older SonarQube scanners or configurations may reject 'sonar.login' in favor of 'sonar.token', causing analysis failures.

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Add OWASP dependency check skip flag to Maven command.
Add git tagging and pushing steps to the build process.
buildspec.yml.after:
git tag -a $PROJECT_VERSION -m "$CODEBUILD_BUILD_ARN"
git push origin HEAD:$VERSION_CHANGELIST $PROJECT_VERSION

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Add new environment variables for git tagging, OWASP scanning, and GitHub authentication.
Add CNJ_ARTIFACT_ID variable to environment configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property to 21 to align with the JDK 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version remains at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Payara Micro server version to a release compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Payara versions may not support running on JDK 21 due to internal API changes or module system restrictions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the MicroProfile specification version to 6.1.
pom.xml.why_exists: MicroProfile 5.0 is tied to older Jakarta EE versions; upgrading ensures compatibility with the new Jakarta EE 10 runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Jakarta EE API version to 10.0.0.
pom.xml.why_exists: Jakarta EE 9 APIs are deprecated or removed in JDK 21 environments; Jakarta EE 10 is required for full compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Payara Micro Maven plugin to version 2.0.
pom.xml.why_exists: Plugin version 1.4.0 may not support the new Payara Micro 6.2024.x bundle generation or JDK 21 build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.11.0.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not fully support JDK 21 language features or compilation flags.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Surefire Plugin to 3.2.1.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may have issues detecting or running tests on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Failsafe Plugin to 3.2.1.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Failsafe versions may have issues detecting or running integration tests on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Docker Maven Plugin to 0.43.4.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Docker plugins may not support newer Docker daemon APIs or JDK 21 build environments.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Compose Maven Plugin to 5.1.0.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compose plugins may not be compatible with the new Docker Compose file formats or JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Helm Maven Plugin to 5.0.0.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older helm plugins may not be compatible with the new Helm chart formats or JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade SLF4J to version 2.0.11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older SLF4J versions may have compatibility issues with newer logging implementations or JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Log4j 2.22.1 as a logging implementation.
Upgrade JUnit to version 5.10.1.
Add AssertJ 3.24.2 for testing assertions.
Upgrade RestAssured to version 5.4.0.
Add Jackson 2.15.3 for JSON processing in tests.
Update common library versions to 1.2.0.
Add multi-platform support for Docker builds.
Update Kubernetes cluster configuration properties.
Add OWASP Dependency Check plugin for security scanning.
Add Jacoco plugin for code coverage.
Add SonarQube plugin for code quality analysis.
Add Jackson BOM for dependency management.
Add SLF4J to JDK14 bridge for logging.
Add AssertJ core dependency for testing.
Add Jackson databind and datatype dependencies for testing.
Add Log4j SLF4J implementation for testing.
Add JCL over SLF4J bridge for logging.
Remove commented out Xdoclint compiler argument.
Add OWASP Dependency Check plugin configuration.
Add Jacoco plugin configuration for code coverage.
Add SonarQube plugin configuration for code quality.
Add resource filtering configuration.
Update profile configurations for pre-commit stage.
Enable multi-platform Docker image builds using Buildx in the docker-maven-plugin configuration.
Add plugin and artifact repositories for the internal CloudTrain Nexus repository to resolve dependencies.
pom.xml.after:
<pluginRepositories>
        <pluginRepository>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <updatePolicy>daily</updatePolicy>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <id>cloudtrain-maven-repository</id>
            <name>msg Automotive CloudTrain Releases Repository</name>
            <url>https://nexus.cloudtrain.aws.msgoat.eu/repository/cloudtrain-releases/</url>
            <layout>default</layout>
        </pluginRepository>
    </pluginRepositories>
    <repositories>
        <repository>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <updatePolicy>daily</updatePolicy>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <id>cloudtrain-maven-repository</id>
            <name>msg Automotive CloudTrain Releases Repository</name>
            <url>https://nexus.cloudtrain.aws.msgoat.eu/repository/cloudtrain-releases/</url>
            <layout>default</layout>
        </repository>
    </repositories>

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Docker base image to use a Java 21 runtime instead of Java 17.
Switch the default garbage collector to ZGC with generational support, which is a feature available in Java 21.

src/test/docker/cnj-config-backend-micro.general_idea: Update comment to remove specific reference to Java EE, generalizing it to just 'application'.
src/test/docker/cnj-config-backend-micro.before: # Composes Docker containers and volumes to a runnable Java EE application
src/test/docker/cnj-config-backend-micro.after: # Composes Docker containers and volumes to a runnable application

src/test/docker/cnj-config-backend-micro.general_idea: Remove the deprecated 'version' field from docker-compose.yml as it is no longer required in modern Docker Compose specifications.
